description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-MacOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow can also be triggered manually. It sets up a macOS job with a 120-minute timeout to build the project. The job checks out the repository, initializes submodules, installs dependencies, sets up Qt, configures and builds the project, deploys frameworks, cleans up rpaths, mac deploys, packages the project, archives artifacts, and updates a tag and release.
